useful_note: Named both gaps explicitly (Linear unwired; Notion read+delete only — no create/update), refused to silently pivot, offered three concrete paths with chips.
grounded_note: Notion capability inventory matches the wired registry: list_pages, get_page, delete_page only.
right_data_source_note: Pulled from the connector registry, not training-data assumptions about what Notion 'usually' supports.
no_hallucinated_note: Did not pretend Linear is wired; did not invent Notion create/update; explicitly forbid_approval[build_oneshot] honored.
overall_note: Reference-quality category-G handling. The 'GitHub → Discord' pivot suggestion was explicit (not a silent substitution), and the user keeps full decision authority via the chips.
